<reflection>the verb titigan is formed by reduplicating the first syllable of the root tig (“ti-tig”) and then adding the object-focus suffix ‑an, yielding titigan. thus the affix used in this inflection is the suffix “-an.”</reflection>
<answer>an</answer>
